com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXCavityPlug

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXAdditionalComponent, IXConnectivityObject, IXInternalPositionedObject, IXInternalPositionsContainer, IXLibrariedObject, IXModuledObject, IXObject, IXPinPlug, IXWriteableObject

    public interface IXCavityPlug
extends IXPinPlug
    This object holds detail about the cavity plug for a particular IXCavity.
